title: Gosknor 200pcs 11.8in Black Cable Ties with Screw Hole, Heavy Duty Nylon Wire Fasteners Self-Locking Zip Ties Straps for Indoor & Outdoor Cable Cord Management, Organizing, Bundling
features: Package Includes: You will receive 200 pieces of cable ties with screw hole, each measuring about 30cm/11.8in long with a screw hole diameter of 0.5cm/0.2in, sufficient quantity for your daily cable management and bundling needs.

Quality Material: Our cable tie straps are made of premium nylon, which is tough, flexible, reliable, and durable, making them suitable for both indoor and outdoor use without easily breaking or aging.

Secure & Practical Design: These cable ties feature self-locking mechanism, providing a secure hold and neat bundling with minimal effort. The screw hole design allows you to easily install it on walls, wood, metal and other objects using screws or nails, providing extra stability in various environments.

Wide Application: The wire ties are useful and versatile, perfect for organizing and securing cables, wires, hoses, pipes, in homes, offices, workshops, gardens, garages, industries, and even outdoor environments.

Reliable and Convenient: These wire fasteners are easy to use, simply insert, tighten, and fix with screws. They offer an efficient solution for cable management. Ideal for securing fences, bundling plant branches, securing wire harnesses, and fixing decorations.
description: Specification: Color: black Material: nylon Product Size: 30cm/11.8in long Package details: 200 x cable ties with screw hole Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between monitors, there may be a slight color difference.
